metadata.title: AI Image Generator
metadata.description: Generate images with AI models, support text-to-image and image-to-image.

page.title: AI Image Generator
page.description: Generate images with AI models, support text-to-image and image-to-image.

generator.title: Image Generator
generator.description: Generate images with AI models, support text-to-image and image-to-image.

form.privacy_hint: Public images appear on the home page and showcases page. Private images stay hidden.
form.aspect_ratio_hint: Choose the width-to-height ratio for the generated image.
form.resolution_hint_simple: 1K is the default, 2K and 4K cost more credits.
form.resolution_hint: 1K is the default. 2K and 4K cost more credits; 4K aspect ratio support varies by model.
form.resolution_hint_gemini_3_pro: 1K is the default, 2K and 4K cost more credits; Gemini 3 Pro supports 1:1, 2:3, 3:2, 3:4, 4:3, 4:5, 5:4, 9:16, and 16:9.
form.resolution_model_hint: The current model does not support resolution switching and will generate at 1K.
form.resolution_model_hint_with_model: The current model {model} does not support resolution switching and will generate at 1K.
form.prompt_placeholder: Enter your prompt to generate or edit images (e.g., 'A beautiful sunset over mountains', 'Make the image more vibrant')
form.reference_image_placeholder: Upload reference images, up to 10 images
form.reference_image_placeholder_gemini_3_pro: Upload reference images, up to 10 files, 5MB each
form.some_images_failed_to_upload: Some images failed to upload, please delete them and re-upload
form.prompt_too_long: Prompt is too long, please delete some content

generator.ready_to_generate_description: Working our magic to create your image. This usually takes a few seconds.

errors.timeout: Image generation timed out. Please try again.
errors.no_images_returned: The provider returned no images. Please retry.
errors.no_models_configured: Please contact the administrator to configure AI models.
errors.insufficient_credits: Insufficient credits. Please top up to keep creating.
errors.prompt_required: Please enter a prompt before generating.
errors.invalid_model_config: Provider or model is not configured correctly.
errors.reference_image_required: Please upload reference images before generating.
errors.create_task_failed: Failed to create an image task
errors.save_showcase_failed: Image generated, but failed to save to showcases
errors.credits_load_failed: Failed to load credits. Please refresh and try again.

user_facing.insufficient_credits: Insufficient credits. Please top up to keep creating.
user_facing.task_limit: You already have too many active tasks. Please wait for an existing task to finish.
user_facing.model_unavailable: The selected model is currently unavailable. Please switch models or try again later.
user_facing.safety_blocked: This request could not be completed because it may violate safety rules. Please adjust the prompt and try again.
user_facing.service_busy: The generation service is busy right now. Please try again in a moment.
user_facing.timeout: Image generation timed out. Please try again.
user_facing.no_result: The generation completed, but no usable image was returned. Please try again.
user_facing.invalid_input: This request could not be completed. Please adjust the prompt or input and try again.
user_facing.generic: Image generation failed. Please try again.

messages.view_in_ai_tasks: You can leave this page now and check the result later in Personal Center - My Works.

alerts.generation_failed_message: This request could not be completed because it may violate safety rules. Please adjust the prompt and try again.

examples.title: Examples: See what Nano Banana can do
examples.hint: Click images to view full size, or use the arrows to switch examples
